title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on Manappuram Finance Limited
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated March 09, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹2.70 lakh (Rupees Two Lakh Seventy Thousand only) on Manappuram Finance Limited (the company) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Guidelines on Compensation of Key Managerial Personnel - Deferral of variable pay’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under section 58G(1)(b) read with section 58B(5)(aa) of the Reserve Bank
